import io
import string

fn finalize(_ in_num: Bool, _ sign: Int, _ cur: Int, _ has_prev: Bool, _ prev: Int, _ sorted: Bool) -> Bool
  if in_num
    let val = sign * cur
    if has_prev and val < prev
      false
    else
      sorted
    end
  else
    sorted
  end
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    check(line)
  when None
    println("YES")
  end
end

fn check(_ line: String) -> Unit
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut i = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut sign = 1
  mut cur = 0
  mut has_prev = false
  mut prev = 0
  mut sorted = true
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    if b >= 48 and b <= 57
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else if (b == 45 or b == 43) and not in_num
      if b == 45
        sign = -1
      end
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        let val = sign * cur
        if has_prev and val < prev
          sorted = false
        end
        prev = val
        has_prev = true
        in_num = false
        sign = 1
        cur = 0
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    let val = sign * cur
    if has_prev and val < prev
      sorted = false
    end
  end
  if sorted
    println("YES")
  else
    println("NO")
  end
end
